stdItem.Name: FoxFire
stdItem.Description: The FoxFire won't leave a burning trail in your wake, but this quantum drive’s strong performance leaves an equal impression. Making it another elegant and powerful component from the folks at Ace Astrogation.

stdItem.Name: LightFire
stdItem.Description: Ace Astrogation built the LightFire for pilots who like to push the edge, but not break the bank. Its focused design provides solid performance at the expense of the component’s durability and stealth.

stdItem.Name: SparkFire
stdItem.Description: The SparkFire quantum drive from Ace Astrogation delivers fined tuned performance at a reasonable price.

stdItem.Name: SunFire
stdItem.Description: Great performance and elegant design makes the Ace Astrogation SunFire quantum drive a favorite among race fans and enthusiasts.

stdItem.Name: Burst
stdItem.Description: With the Burst quantum drive, ArcCorp has taken their popular Rush model and through streamlined re-engineering, managed to improve upon it.

stdItem.Name: Flood
stdItem.Description: Experience the true joy of the journey with the Flood. This small quantum drive from ArcCorp has been a staple around the Empire for years.

stdItem.Name: Rush
stdItem.Description: The Rush is a popular commercial quantum drive that lives up to its name.

stdItem.Name: Cascade
stdItem.Description: The latest medium-sized quantum drive from ArcCorp, the Cascade will confidently carry you to your destination time and time again.

stdItem.Name: Flash
stdItem.Description: With improved spooling and calibration, the new ArcCorp Flash drive can get you in and out of quantum easier and faster.

stdItem.Name: Torrent
stdItem.Description: Whatever destination you choose, the ArcCorp Torrent quantum drive is a solid choice to help get you there direct and hassle-free.

stdItem.Name: Echo
stdItem.Description: ArcCorp carefully crafted and calibrated the Echo into an affordable yet effective quantum drive.

stdItem.Name: Fissure
stdItem.Description: Spool up the Fissure and speed through space with the component ArcCorp claims has successfully completed billions of quantum travels over the centuries.

stdItem.Name: Impulse
stdItem.Description: Legend claims an inaccurate lathe cut materials thinner than expected on the Impulse prototype. When its test performance exceeded expectations, engineers adopted the changes, and ArcCorp's premiere size three quantum drive was born.

stdItem.Name: Colossus
stdItem.Description: Juno Starwerk makes quantum drives that can go the distance and the Colossus is no exception. Though, once you experience its dependable performance for yourself, you might just want to call it exceptional.

stdItem.Name: Goliath
stdItem.Description: The Goliath was designed to be more durable than other quantum drives in its class. That’s made it a staple of industrial ship since Humanity first started to explore the stars.

stdItem.Name: Vulcan
stdItem.Description: Juno Starwerk designed the Vulcan to be both cost efficient and durable. It won’t win any awards for its performance but can be trusted to get you to your destination.

stdItem.Name: Bolon
stdItem.Description: Don’t let lesser craftsmanship put you and your precious cargo at risk. The Bolon industrial quantum drive was built with durability in mind to keep it working when you need it most.

stdItem.Name: Huracan
stdItem.Description: Juno Starwerk understands that your most important job is to keep your cargo safe. That’s why their Huracan quantum drive prioritizes interdiction shielding, stability, and damage efficiency above everything else.

stdItem.Name: Yaluk
stdItem.Description: The bigger the haul, the harder your quantum drive has to work. With Juno Starwerk’s Yaluk onboard, you’ll know that you have a quantum drive that is up to the challenge of getting the job done.

stdItem.Name: Agni
stdItem.Description: Haulers have relied on Juno Starwerk's stellar industrial craftsmanship for centuries. The company constantly updates and improves the design of the Agni quantum drive to ensure it remains a top-of-the-line industrial component.

stdItem.Name: Kama
stdItem.Description: The Kama from Juno Starwerk has won more “Fan Favorite” reader’s poll from ‘Long Haul Quarterly’ than any other industrial quantum drive in its class.

stdItem.Name: Vesta
stdItem.Description: Ensure your goods get to where they need to go with the Vesta quantum drive. Juno Starwerk specifically designed the component to handle all the trials and tribulations of the long haul.

stdItem.Name: Allegro
stdItem.Description: Designed specifically for the 890 Jump, the Allegro quantum drive blends ArcCorp's expertise with Origin's exceptionally high standards, making it the ideal companion for a luxury cruise through the stars.

stdItem.Name: Drift
stdItem.Description: Built to keep heat and signature levels low, the Drift quantum drive from RAMP Corporation helps to minimize emissions generated while spooling.

stdItem.Name: Spectre
stdItem.Description: The Spectre can't make your ship invisible, but it comes close. Expertly crafted by RAMP, this quantum drive disperses heat and hides IR and EM signatures to make it a great small component for those that want to go unnoticed.

stdItem.Name: Zephyr
stdItem.Description: By minimizing emissions through an advanced reduced outflow filtration process, the RAMP Zephyr quantum drive helps ensure privacy while traveling wherever you go.

stdItem.Name: Bolt
stdItem.Description: The RAMP Corporation continues their line of low emission quantum drives with the Bolt. This medium-sized component will blast you from one location to the next while producing a minimal signature.

stdItem.Name: Nova
stdItem.Description: Don't draw attention to yourself with the Nova, which is RAMP Corporation’s base, medium-sized stealth quantum drive.

stdItem.Name: Spicule
stdItem.Description: Here one second and gone the next. That’s what you’ll get with the Spicule quantum drive, which RAMP engineered to keep the component’s emission signature as low as possible.

stdItem.Name: Atlas
stdItem.Description: Though it may seem commonplace today, Humanity’s ability to travel across solar systems at quantum speeds was built upon a foundation of Roberts Space Industries’ technology and craftsmanship. Now, space travel has reached even higher heights thanks to the top-of-class performance of RSI’s Atlas pushing quantum drive technology farther than it’s ever gone.

stdItem.Name: Eos
stdItem.Description: The Eos quantum drive has been a staple in the RSI product line for centuries. Its original design was so perfectly fine-tuned that it has remained basically unchanged since.

stdItem.Name: Hyperion
stdItem.Description: In honor of the name, the first test flight destination for this popular RSI quantum drive was the similarly named satellite of Saturn.

stdItem.Name: Aither
stdItem.Description: Named for an ancient god of light and the heavens, the Aither quantum drive honors its namesake as it ferries people places their ancestors could never imagine. This classic RSI medium-sized component has graced civilian ships for centuries.

stdItem.Name: Hemera
stdItem.Description: Designing the Hemera quantum drive has allowed the technicians at Robert Space Industries to push the boundaries of quantum travel technology even further, and allow you to go even farther.

stdItem.Name: Khaos
stdItem.Description: RSI's Khaos has been tuned to provide dependable performance with reliable construction. Once you've got this strapped in, you'll appreciate the order this quantum drive brings to the chaos of travel.

stdItem.Name: Erebos
stdItem.Description: The Erebos exemplifies RSI's commitment to excellence. This high quality quantum drive constantly ranks atop "Best of" lists for both critics and consumers.

stdItem.Name: Metis
stdItem.Description: There's no room for error when bending space and time to travel incredible distances. So put your trust in RSI, a company that's delivered quality components to the public since the dawn of space flight.

stdItem.Name: Tyche
stdItem.Description: The Tyche quantum drive harmoniously balances performance, durability, and stealth to create a well-rounded component capable of adeptly handling a variety of situations.

stdItem.Name: Expedition
stdItem.Description: Cruise through space confident that your perfectly balanced Expedition quantum drive from Tarsus will get you exactly where you’re going.

stdItem.Name: Voyage
stdItem.Description: Crafted by passionate people who have been leading the way in space exploration and travel for over six centuries, the Voyage by Tarsus is a quantum drive worthy of your next expedition.

stdItem.Name: Wayfare
stdItem.Description: Speed through space without breaking the bank. The Warfare is a small quantum drive from Tarsus that was specifically designed to help make space travel affordable for the masses.

stdItem.Name: Odyssey
stdItem.Description: Adventure amidst the stars awaits with the Odyssey quantum drive. Careful and continued refinement from the Tarsus team has kept this component on the cutting edge for centuries.

stdItem.Name: Quest
stdItem.Description: Why mess with perfection? Tarsus has been manufacturing the Quest drive for centuries to provide everyone an affordable medium-sized component to carry them on their adventures.

stdItem.Name: Sojourn
stdItem.Description: When you explore a star system, it should be about the experiences, the sights, the memories. The Tarsus Sojourn quantum drive takes all the worry out of quantum travel so that you can focus on what’s important, the journey.

stdItem.Name: Drifter
stdItem.Description: Balancing craftsmanship and cost, the Drifter provides renowned Tarsus performance at an affordable price.

stdItem.Name: Ranger
stdItem.Description: Rely on the Ranger to guide you through the stars. The quality and reliability of this classic Tarsus quantum drive has made it a ship staple for centuries.

stdItem.Name: Wanderer
stdItem.Description: Tarsus carefully designed and tuned the Wanderer into an all-around solid quantum drive, making it one of the more popular components in their revered line-up.

stdItem.Name: Beacon
stdItem.Description: Wei-Tek has made other mil-spec component manufacturers sit up and take notice with the introduction of the highly praised Beacon quantum drive.

stdItem.Name: Siren
stdItem.Description: Recent changes by Wei-Tek to the alloys used in the Siren have improved its performance without sacrificing durability, making it a respectable military-grade quantum drive.

stdItem.Name: VK-00
stdItem.Description: When the stakes are high, Wei-Tek’s advanced VK-00 quantum drive is the only choice you should trust to get you where you need to be.

stdItem.Name: Crossfield
stdItem.Description: Wei-Tek has marketed the Crossfield specifically to target military personnel and veteran pilots who will appreciate the stats that the mil-spec quantum drive offers.

stdItem.Name: XL-1
stdItem.Description: Wei-Tek might be a new company, but their line of military-grade components is already gaining notoriety. The XL-1 is their premier medium quantum drive that expertly blends performance and durability.

stdItem.Name: Yeager
stdItem.Description: Whether you’re rushing to the rescue or simply patrolling through a sector, the Yeager quantum drive from Wei-Tek allows for greater performance when you need it most.

stdItem.Name: Balandin
stdItem.Description: Wei-Tek built the Balandin with military and security personnel in mind. Following a series of test runs by veterans, engineers accelerated the spool and calibration times while also improving the component's precision and stability.

stdItem.Name: Pontes
stdItem.Description: When placed under stress tests, the proprietary alloys used by Wei-Tek to build the Pontes proved themselves against competitors in the same class.

stdItem.Name: TS-2
stdItem.Description: Advanced protective plating provides the TS-2 with superior durability and protection against the elements and aggressors, making it an ideal quantum drive for those moments when danger calls.

stdItem.Name: Frontline
stdItem.Description: This capital-class quantum drive was designed specifically for the Idris frigate.

stdItem.Name: RADR_AntiPersonnel_Turret
stdItem.Description: @LOC_PLACEHOLDER

stdItem.Name: Hunter
stdItem.Description: When a low signature is of the utmost importance, the Hunter stealth radar will keep you aware of what’s around without getting you found.

stdItem.Name: Pelerous
stdItem.Description: Aggressors can’t attack what they can’t see, so keep your signature low with the Pelorous stealth radar from Blue Triangle Inc.

stdItem.Name: Prophet
stdItem.Description: The art of seeing without being seen has never been better exemplified than by the Prophet radar system. Blue Triangle Inc. has managed to maximize sensitivity while minimizing pulse emissions to create a radar ideal for remaining off other people’s.

stdItem.Name: Cassandra
stdItem.Description: When staying undetected is the key to operational security, the Cassandra radar features reduced emissions while still providing above average performance.

stdItem.Name: Predator
stdItem.Description: Created for those that want to keep a low profile, the Predator radar operates with low electromagnetic emissions, to help reduce your signature.

stdItem.Name: Spyglass
stdItem.Description: Designed to help you remain undetected by hostile parties, the Spyglass radar operates with lower emissions while still giving you the full picture.

stdItem.Name: BroadSpec-Go
stdItem.Description: The BroadSpec-Go was designed with accuracy, reliability, and durability in mind. And that's exactly what this radar provides.

stdItem.Name: FullSpec-Go
stdItem.Description: Chimera Communications knows that for a high quality radar, consistency is key. The FullSpec-Go, specifically designed to offer clarity in the most hazardous of terrain, guarantees you'll get where you need to go without any surprises.

stdItem.Name: Observer-Go
stdItem.Description: Designed to be as accessible as possible, the Observer-Go is a strong entry-level radar for those that want to keep themselves informed without breaking the bank.

stdItem.Name: Surveyor-Go
stdItem.Description: The SurveyorGo is a vehicle-sized version of Chimera Communications' popular line of radars.

stdItem.Name: Observer-Lite
stdItem.Description: The Observer-Lite is a no-frills radar ready for those long hauls. Trust the brand that focuses on how good a radar works and not just how it looks.

stdItem.Name: Surveyor-Lite
stdItem.Description: There’s a lot for you to worry about on those long hauls. Don’t let your radar’s performance be one of them. You can count on the Surveyor-Lite from Chimera Communications to provide the durability and performance that you need.

stdItem.Name: BroadSpec
stdItem.Description: The Chimera Communications BroadSpec radar has an important job to do and does it well, detecting a wide range of emissions and signatures with a dependability you can count on.

stdItem.Name: FullSpec
stdItem.Description: The FullSpec radar is considered by many to be one of the most dependable radar systems you can equip your rig with on the market today. Chimera Communications has worked hard to reduce false positives while improving consistency over range and the results speak for themselves.

stdItem.Name: Observer
stdItem.Description: Using formerly classified military technology, this now publically available radar is designed to offer key information to the user.

stdItem.Name: Surveyor
stdItem.Description: The Surveyor radar from Chimera Communications does away with all the unnecessary extras other manufacturers hide behind to focus on what matters: signature and emission detection that works the way you need it to.

stdItem.Name: BroadSpec
stdItem.Description: The Chimera Communications BroadSpec radar has an important job to do and does it well, detecting a wide range of emissions and signatures with a dependability you can count on.

stdItem.Name: FullSpec-Max
stdItem.Description: Keep your targets in your sights with the FullSpec-Max radar featuring advanced hard-working systems that excel at identifying potential threats.

stdItem.Name: Observer-Max
stdItem.Description: Dependable and built to last, the Observer-Max offers standard radar detection.

stdItem.Name: Surveyor-Max
stdItem.Description: The Surveyor-Max radar system is designed to effectively identify nearby objects so that you can stay focused on what matters.

stdItem.Name: BroadSpec-Max
stdItem.Description: Keep your eyes on the prize with the BroadSpec-Max. Suitable for the largest of ships, this radar performs effectively without compromise.

stdItem.Name: Radar
stdItem.Description: @item_Desc_RADR_Default

stdItem.Name: Agure
stdItem.Description: Trusted by many security firms for their vehicles, this reliable and consistent radar will keep your operation on track.

stdItem.Name: Prevenir
stdItem.Description: The Prevenir has been refined by extensive military field testing, making it the go-to vehicle radar for many across the UEE.

stdItem.Name: Sens
stdItem.Description: The cutting-edge GNP Sens design elevates radar technology to meet or exceed the specifications used by most military organizations operating today.

stdItem.Name: V60-26
stdItem.Description: Providing crucial information during your operation, the V60-26 radar offers highly accurate and detailed updates on nearby emissions.

stdItem.Name: Ecouter
stdItem.Description: Space is vast and unknowable, that’s why discerning pilots rely on the Ecouter small radar from GNP to keep them in the know about what’s around them.

stdItem.Name: Tige
stdItem.Description: Situational awareness is key when engaging with hostiles. The GNP developed the Tige radar with improved accuracy to helps ensure that any viable contacts are detected.

stdItem.Name: V801-11
stdItem.Description: Designed for the battlefield, the V801-11 is a cut above the rest thanks to the rigid, iterative testing, guaranteeing its performance when you need it most.

stdItem.Name: Voir
stdItem.Description: The Voir is not just for the military anymore. Now you too can attach this small radar to your ship to stay safe.

stdItem.Name: Epier
stdItem.Description: GNP’s finely tuned Epier medium radar delivers military grade stats for advanced signature detection wherever your mission takes you.

stdItem.Name: Savoir
stdItem.Description: Boasting a decent range and energy efficiency, the Savoir is a radar designed for those that favor reliability.

stdItem.Name: V801-12
stdItem.Description: During field operations, the GNP V801-12 radar system allows for increased strategic planning owing to its capability for detecting a wide variety of emission signatures, revealing hazards and hostiles alike.

stdItem.Name: Vigilance
stdItem.Description: Vigilance means keeping a careful watch for any possible dangerous threats and the GNP radar that bears this name allows you to do just that with its proprietary emission accrual.

stdItem.Name: Devoue
stdItem.Description: The Devoue radar is able to render nearby energy emissions accurately and quickly, allowing you to retain control even in the most dire situations.

stdItem.Name: Fidele
stdItem.Description: Focusing on the core features of a radar, the Fidele operates efficiently even in battle conditions.

stdItem.Name: Resolu
stdItem.Description: Invented with larger ships in mind, the Resolu radar provides the same level of three-dimensional scanning technology without sacrificing dependability.

stdItem.Name: V880
stdItem.Description: Providing useful assistance when detecting hostiles, the V880 brings the power of military technology to the consumer market.

stdItem.Name: SNSR5
stdItem.Description: The SNSR5 radar small size and dependable performance makes it the perfect device for entry-level users.

stdItem.Name: SNS-R6
stdItem.Description: Increased power and performance makes the SNS-R6 stand out from other radars in its class. Get yours today to see why pilots the Empire over love components from Nav-E7 Gadgets.

stdItem.Name: SNSR7
stdItem.Description: Engineered to give your vehicle the edge, the SNSR7 provides real-time tracking information on all surrounding emissions.

stdItem.Name: SNS-R6x
stdItem.Description: The SNS-R6x provides certainty when detecting electromagnetic emissions, as well as offering reasonable levels of energy efficiency.

stdItem.Name: SNS-R5x
stdItem.Description: Perfect for an entry-level pilot, the SNS-R5x trades excessive frills for energy efficiency.

stdItem.Name: SNS-R7x
stdItem.Description: Favoring energy efficiency above all, the SNS-R7x is a radar is ideal for those looking to manage their ship's levels effectively, whilst still providing excellent vision.

stdItem.Name: RADR_S00_Fake
stdItem.Description: @LOC_PLACEHOLDER

stdItem.Name: Radar
stdItem.Description: @LOC_PLACEHOLDER

stdItem.Name: RADR_Unmaned_Turret
stdItem.Description: @LOC_PLACEHOLDER

stdItem.Name: Denning
stdItem.Description: With the Denning, you can now equip an award winning WillsOp radar to your vehicle.

stdItem.Name: Fabian
stdItem.Description: Utilizing best-in-class scanning technology, the Fabian radar ensures you won't be caught unaware.

stdItem.Name: Vogel
stdItem.Description: As you ride to destinations new and afar, uncover the unknown with the Vogel radar from WillsOp that features innovative signature filtration and detection algorithms.

stdItem.Name: Abetti
stdItem.Description: Supplying high powered detection technology, the Abetti's advanced systems offer a responsive radar experience.

stdItem.Name: Backlund
stdItem.Description: Wherever you fly, the WillsOp Backlund radar is perfect for gathering information on what’s nearby and detecting a variety of emission signatures.

stdItem.Name: Capston
stdItem.Description: Experience why WillsOp is a premiere manufacturer of ship electronics with their Capston radar. Outfit your ship with one today so you know what’s nearby.

stdItem.Name: Fleming
stdItem.Description: The Fleming is WillsOp’s base small radar. What it lacks in bells and whistles, it makes up for with consistent performance.

stdItem.Name: Agrippa
stdItem.Description: A superior quality radar able to accurate provide information on your vehicle's surroundings.

stdItem.Name: Battani
stdItem.Description: Expand your horizons with the WilsOp Battani radar and its advanced passive detection system.

stdItem.Name: Chernykh
stdItem.Description: The Chernykh is named after the famed 26th century engineer who designed some of the most prized radars of that era. This medium radar from WillsOp celebrates both the look and performance of those classic components.

stdItem.Name: Fawad
stdItem.Description: The Fawad entry-level radar from WillsOp is the perfect choice for someone who is looking for a no-frills signature detection system perfect for everyday use.

stdItem.Name: Anysta
stdItem.Description: Avoid getting tunnel vision with the Anysta radar. Offering exceptional performance all round, this radar will help keep you informed.

stdItem.Name: Capsulo
stdItem.Description: For a dependable radar with above average performance, the Capsulo is a trustworthy option.

stdItem.Name: Socoria
stdItem.Description: The Socoria is a well-rounded radar providing everything a pilot needs for an effective radar at a reasonable price point.
